apiKey.label: Memori API Key
apiKey.help: API key from memorilabs.ai (or use MEMORI_API_KEY env var)

entityId.label: Entity ID
entityId.help: Required. The unique identifier to attribute these memories to.

projectId.label: Project ID
projectId.help: Required. Scopes all memories to this project.
